footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_ql_hd' and val = '1') begin select 'setObject$Form&Controller;(this, true);' as message return end

declare @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select 'this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + '''; on&Controller;TypeSelectedIndexChanged(this.getItem(''trung_so'')); active$Form&Controller;(this);onChange$Type$&Controller;(this);' as message return

declare @trung_so int, @cb_yn bit select @trung_so = abs(m_trung_so), @cb_yn = case when m_trung_so < 0 then 1 else 0 end from v20dmnkt where ma_nkt = @ma_nkt select @trung_so as trung_so, @cb_yn as cb_yn return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$fieldConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyển %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục quyển chứng từ.' else N'The book voucher %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyển %s1 hoặc đơn vị %s2 đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the voucher book %s1 or unit %s2. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyển %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the voucher book %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã quyển %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The book voucher %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$fieldConflict = ''
update @v20dmctnkt set ma_nkt = @ma_nkt, lstuser = lstuser2 insert into v20dmctnkt select * from @v20dmctnkt

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_nkt = $ma_nkt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_nkt' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_nkt.OldValue)) as message return end
declare @unit varchar(33), @ma_nkt_s varchar(32) select @unit = ma_dvcs from @@table where ma_nkt = $ma_nkt.OldValue select @ma_nkt_s = replace(replace(@ma_nkt, '[', '0'),']', '0') if @ma_nkt <> $ma_nkt.OldValue or @ma_dvcs <> @unit begin if exists(select * from @@table where ((replace(replace(ma_nkt, '[', '0'),']', '0') like rtrim(@ma_nkt_s) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_nkt_s) like rtrim(replace(replace(ma_nkt, '[', '0'),']', '0')) + '%') and ma_nkt <> $ma_nkt.OldValue) begin select 'ma_nkt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_nkt)) as message return end end &Check; if @ma_nkt <> $ma_nkt.OldValue begin if $v20dmctnkt.NewValue = $v20dmctnkt.OldValue update v20dmctnkt set ma_nkt = @ma_nkt, lstuser = lstuser2 where ma_nkt = $ma_nkt.OldValue end
update @v20dmctnkt set ma_nkt = @ma_nkt, lstuser = lstuser2 #IF $v20dmctnkt.NewValue <> $v20dmctnkt.OldValue #THEN delete v20dmctnkt where ma_nkt = $ma_nkt.OldValue #END

update @@table set m_trung_so = case when @$cb_yn = 1 then -@$trung_so else @$trung_so end, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_nkt = @ma_nkt
#IF $v20dmctnkt.NewValue <> $v20dmctnkt.OldValue #THEN insert into v20dmctnkt select * from @v20dmctnkt #END
declare @message nvarchar(255), @type char(1), @ma_nk char(8) select @message = replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_nkt)) delete v20dmctnkt where ma_nkt = @ma_nkt
